   "reasoning": "I'm prioritizing funding boosts and staff hiring because our schools desperately need more resources and support staff to reduce class sizes and alleviate teacher burnout. I'm wary of teacher incentives that could be tied to test scores, and I refuse to support transparency reports that could be used to blame teachers for systemic problems. We need to focus on supporting our teachers and students, not creating more bureaucracy.",
